merchant_items.name: Restoration Draught
merchant_items.description: A legendary golden potion that can bring someone back from death's door.

merchant_items.name: Elixir of Vigor

consumable_effects.description: Grants one additional melee attack per turn for the duration of combat

merchant_items.description: A crystal-clear potion that sharpens the mind and restores magical energy.

consumable_effects.description: Restores one expended spell slot of any level

merchant_items.name: Alchemist's Fire
merchant_items.description: A volatile orange potion that imbues weapons with supernatural flame.

consumable_effects.description: Adds 1d6 fire damage to all attacks for the duration of combat

merchant_items.name: Holy Water
merchant_items.description: Blessed water that burns the undead and heals the faithful.

consumable_effects.description: Restores 3d8+6 hit points, or deals 2d6 damage to undead creatures

merchant_items.name: Antidote
merchant_items.description: A bitter green potion that neutralizes poisons and toxins.

consumable_effects.description: Neutralizes poison and restores 1d4 hit points

merchant_items.name: Bedroll
merchant_items.description: A simple roll of bedding for sleeping on the road.

merchant_items.name: Glowcap Mushrooms
merchant_items.description: Bioluminescent mushrooms that emit a soft blue-green glow. Essential for advanced alchemical formulas.

merchant_items.name: Marcus's Masterwork Elixir
merchant_items.description: A deep blue elixir of extraordinary potency, representing the pinnacle of alchemical achievement.

consumable_effects.description: Restores 6d8+15 hit points, grants 10 temporary hit points, and increases all stats by +2 for 3 rounds

merchant_items.name: Marcus's Journals
merchant_items.description: A collection of worn leather journals documenting Marcus Nightshade's descent from idealistic alchemist to cult devotee. The pages smell faintly of chemicals and regret.
read_text: Finally, real funding for my research! The benefactors are generous, and their interest in medicinal advancement seems genuine. If we can stabilize the healing properties I've theorized, we could save hundreds of lives. Cassia is cautious, but I know this is our chance.
ENTRY 2 - Two Years, Eight Months Ago:

The ore samples they brought today... I've never seen anything like it. Aethel Ore, they call it. The resonance is unlike any mineral I've studied. When I hold it, I can almost hear... No. I'm being fanciful. It's just a unique crystalline structure. The potential applications are staggering.
ENTRY 3 - Two Years, Three Months Ago:

The Master visited today. He speaks with such clarity about the ore's true nature. The others call it 'research,' but he showed me - it's so much more. There's power here beyond healing. Beyond mortal limitations. Cassia doesn't understand. She's afraid. But the Master says fear is natural when facing transcendence.
ENTRY 4 - One Year, Nine Months Ago:

I returned to the Hill Ruins last night. Cassia was asleep. The portal chamber beneath... the way it hums with the ore's resonance. I can feel the veil thinning. The Master says I'm close to understanding. Knowledge serves life? No. Knowledge serves POWER. True power.
ENTRY 5 - One Year, Six Months Ago (Final Entry):

Tomorrow I transcend. The ritual is prepared. The Master has shown me what lies beyond. I will leave this journal for whoever finds it. Tell Cassia... No. She chose fear over greatness. My only regret is that she'll never understand what I've become. The portal calls. I answer.

loot_items.name: Rat Pelt
loot_items.description: A smelly rat hide. Merchants will buy it for a pittance.

loot_items.name: Diseased Fang
loot_items.description: A nasty tooth from a giant rat. Alchemists might want this.

loot_items.name: Rat Tail
loot_items.description: A disgusting trophy. Some pay coin for pest proof.

loot_items.name: Goblin Ear
loot_items.description: Proof of a goblin kill. Bounties are paid for these.

loot_items.name: Rusty Dagger
loot_items.description: A corroded blade. Barely worth melting down.

loot_items.name: Crude Shortbow
loot_items.description: A poorly made bow. The string is frayed.

loot_items.name: Tattered Leather Scraps
loot_items.description: Worn leather pieces. Could be repaired or sold for scrap.

loot_items.name: Kobold Scale
loot_items.description: A shimmering scale from a kobold. Collectors pay for exotic specimens.

loot_items.name: Kobold Trap Parts
loot_items.description: Springs, wire, and mechanisms. Could be useful for a tinkerer.

loot_items.name: Bone Fragment
loot_items.description: A piece of ancient bone. Still has dark magic clinging to it.

loot_items.name: Rusted Shortsword
loot_items.description: An old blade covered in rust. Barely functional.

loot_items.name: Cracked Wooden Shield
loot_items.description: A broken shield. Might stop one blow before falling apart.

loot_items.name: Shadow Essence
loot_items.description: A wisp of darkness captured in a vial. Necromancers seek this.

loot_items.name: Spectral Fragment
loot_items.description: A shard of ghostly energy. Glows faintly in darkness.

loot_items.name: Cursed Talisman
loot_items.description: A dark amulet that pulses with malevolent energy.

loot_items.name: Cult Robes
loot_items.description: Dark robes marked with sinister symbols. Disturbing to wear.

loot_items.name: Ritual Dagger
loot_items.description: A ceremonial blade with dark runes. Still sharp and deadly.

loot_items.name: Stolen Coin Purse
loot_items.description: A small purse with someone else's initials. Contains a few coins.

loot_items.name: Lockpicks
loot_items.description: A set of thieves' tools. Well-worn but functional.

loot_items.name: Cheap Cloak
loot_items.description: A worn traveler's cloak. Has seen better days.

loot_items.name: Spider Silk
loot_items.description: Fine, incredibly strong silk from a giant spider. Sought after by armorers and enchanters.

loot_items.name: Venom Gland
loot_items.description: A potent poison sac from a spider. Alchemists can extract valuable toxins from it.

loot_items.name: Spider Leg
loot_items.description: A chitinous spider leg. The barbed hairs and sharp tip make it useful for crafting.

loot_items.name: Twisted Staff
loot_items.description: A gnarled wooden staff carved with dark runes. It hums with corrupted magic.

loot_items.name: Crude Armor Scraps
loot_items.description: Pieces of poorly-made leather and hide armor. A blacksmith could salvage the materials.

loot_items.name: Kobold Spell Focus
loot_items.description: A crude bone talisman used by kobold shamans to channel their magic. Still radiates faint power.

loot_items.name: Silver Coins
loot_items.description: A small collection of old silver coins, tarnished with age but still valuable.

loot_items.name: Strange Relic
loot_items.description: An ancient religious artifact defaced with dark symbols. It radiates an unsettling aura.

loot_items.name: Ancient Coins
loot_items.description: Weathered coins from a long-forgotten era, stamped with symbols of an ancient kingdom. Collectors might pay well for these.

loot_items.name: Stone Fragment
loot_items.description: A chunk of enchanted stone from an animated guardian. Still faintly warm with residual magic.

loot_items.name: Cult Documents
loot_items.description: Disturbing papers covered in ritual diagrams and cryptic notes about dark ceremonies.

loot_items.name: Ancient Runic Key
loot_items.description: An iron key covered in mysterious runes that seem to shimmer in the light. The brigand leader must have stolen it from the hill ruins. It feels cold to the touch and thrums with residual magic.

special_effects.description: Opens the sealed dungeon beneath the hill ruins

loot_items.name: Broken Holy Symbol
loot_items.description: A damaged religious symbol, split in half. It once belonged to a priest or paladin.
